iti60:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti60:2.1: “Monks, there are these three grounds for meritorious activity.
iti60:2.3:
The ground for meritorious activity made of generosity, the ground for meritorious activity made of virtue,
and the ground for meritorious activity made of development [meditation].
iti60:2.4: These are the three grounds for meritorious activity.”
iti60:3.2: that yield the foremost profit of bliss–
iti60:3.3: develop generosity, a life in tune,
iti60:4.2: three things that bring about bliss,
iti60:4.4: in a world of bliss unalloyed.
